creator: amarendra.godbole@gmail.com
text:
wcalc author has released a new version, 2.3 with numerous bug-fixes, and some new features. This PR is about updating to this new version.

Fix: sh wcalc.shar.txt will re-create the wcalc directory with required files. Kindly submit them to the repository. wcalc.shar.txt is attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
